name: Defect/Damaged Package Clearance ? Proline Bentonite Clumping Cat Litter - Odourless (Unscented) 10L
description: Proline Bentonite Clumping Odourless (Unscented) Cat Litter , 100% natural bentonite cat litter instantly clumps. Excellent pelletising, instantly lumps Neutralises odour without heavy perfumes Non-toxic and 100% natural Thin grain shape Prevents bacterial growth Upon first use, we recommend adding new silica cat litter to the surface of the old cat litter for a few days.
